name: grimoire
description: Firetop Mountain Plugin Registry — SDD multi-agent review pipeline and documentation tools for Claude Code.

plugins.name: sdd-final-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent review pipeline: QA + Security in parallel, then Tech Leader as dispatcher. Saves versioned cycle reports and posts verdicts to GitHub PRs.

plugins.name: sdd-create-docs
plugins.description: SDD authoring tools: /adr records Architecture Decision Records and /learning-lesson captures lessons learned. Auto-numbered files plus a maintained CLAUDE.md index.
